phases.name: Year 1
phases.subtitle: Explore
phases.description: Introduction to agribusiness foundations and career pathways in agriculture, food systems, and supply chain management.

milestones.label: Explore agribusiness career pathways
milestones.description: Survey of agribusiness sectors including food industry management, agricultural finance, supply chain logistics, and international trade. Students explore career options through industry guest speakers and field visits.

milestones.label: Master microeconomic principles
milestones.description: Supply and demand, market structures, and pricing theory applied to agricultural markets and food systems economics.

milestones.label: Build quantitative foundations
milestones.description: Mathematical foundations for business analytics, financial calculations, and statistical modeling in agribusiness.

milestones.label: Study biological science foundations
milestones.description: Biological principles underlying agricultural production, food safety, and environmental sustainability.

phases.name: Year 2
phases.subtitle: Engage
phases.description: Business technology, supply chain management, and economic analysis build professional competencies.

milestones.label: Master agribusiness information technology
milestones.description: Database management, spreadsheet modeling, and precision agriculture technology applications. Students develop data-driven decision-making skills for modern agribusiness operations.

milestones.label: Study management principles
milestones.description: Organizational behavior, leadership, and management theory applied to agricultural enterprises and food industry organizations.

milestones.label: Analyze agricultural supply chains
milestones.description: Supply chain design, logistics, inventory management, and procurement for agricultural commodities and food products. Global supply chain analysis and risk management.

milestones.label: Master financial accounting
milestones.description: Financial accounting principles, balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow analysis for agricultural enterprises.

phases.name: Year 3
phases.subtitle: Develop
phases.description: Applied economics, agricultural accounting, and concentration coursework develop specialized expertise.

milestones.label: Apply agricultural economics analysis
milestones.description: Economic analysis methods applied to agricultural policy, commodity markets, and farm management decisions. Students analyze real USDA data and develop economic impact assessments.

milestones.label: Master agricultural accounting
milestones.description: Cost accounting, budgeting, and financial management specific to agricultural operations, cooperatives, and food industry firms.

milestones.label: Develop agricultural marketing strategies
milestones.description: Marketing principles for agricultural commodities, food products, and agribusiness services. Students develop marketing plans analyzing both domestic and international market opportunities.

milestones.label: Complete summer internship
milestones.description: Supervised internship at an agribusiness firm, USDA agency, agricultural cooperative, or food industry company. Students apply classroom knowledge in professional settings.

phases.name: Year 4
phases.subtitle: Launch
phases.description: Quantitative analysis, capstone, and professional preparation finalize career readiness.

milestones.label: Master quantitative analysis methods
milestones.description: Statistical methods, linear programming, and decision analysis applied to agribusiness management. Students use SAS, Excel, and specialized software for data-driven agricultural decision-making.

milestones.label: Complete agribusiness capstone
milestones.description: Integrative capstone project addressing a real agribusiness challenge. Student teams work with industry partners to develop business plans, market analyses, or operational improvement proposals.

milestones.label: Complete concentration coursework
milestones.description: Advanced coursework in chosen concentration: Food Industry Management, International Agribusiness, or Agricultural Finance.

milestones.label: Finalize career placement preparation
milestones.description: Resume workshops, mock interviews, career fair preparation, and professional portfolio development. Students leverage CAES career services and alumni networks.
